prospective_output: frozen Sparse4Dv3 receiver outputs and CF-R analysis
task_construct: dynamic relative-conflict information transport, not calibrated physical risk

complete_future_window.reset_boundary: t=0 contains the first speed-dependent ConstantPlanner update and is excluded

state_relations: at every valid timestamp: slow actor forward < nominal < fast
at every valid timestamp: slow ego-footprint clearance < nominal < fast
receiver_motion_relation: associated longitudinal slope: slow < nominal < fast; more negative means stronger observed closure

receiver.name: Sparse4Dv3 R50 official release
receiver.role: qualified supporting ordinal receiver, not risk truth

gates: exact hashes for reused CF-M RGB/state/run inputs
all state and receiver comparisons restricted to the complete-future window
state forward and footprint-clearance order passes at every valid timestamp
receiver source commit, config, checkpoint, threshold, cadence, and modalities match the frozen contract
missing receiver association remains unavailable and is not imputed

decision_rules.accepted: state gate passes, every planned receiver observation is available, and the claimed receiver order has zero reversal or tie
decision_rules.down-weighted: state gate passes and aggregate receiver direction is expected, but one or more observations are unavailable or reversed
decision_rules.rejected: state order fails, aggregate receiver direction reverses, or an input/identity/horizon gate fails

strongest_allowed_claim: within the reused 0.5/1.0/1.5 m/s designed range and complete-future window, HUGSIM state preserves the declared relative-conflict order and the qualified Sparse4Dv3 receiver preserves or fails to preserve the corresponding longitudinal direction
forbidden_claims: the factor levels are real-world safe or unsafe thresholds
Sparse4Dv3 confidence, distance, or velocity is calibrated risk truth
the result establishes braking need, planning/control response, collision probability, or closed-loop credibility
the result establishes real-sim equivalence or general HUGSIM fitness
